all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And Moses came and told the people all the words of the Lord, and all the judgments: and all the people answered with one voice, and said, All the words which the Lord hath said will we do.
Exodus 24:3
Quote of the Day
"A desire to truly return to God is accompanied by the determination to be completely honest with your Heavenly Father."
Elder Neil L. Andersen | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
